generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? While some argue for more international cooperation, the truth is that strategic autonomy is our best defense. Look at how [Allied Nation] struggled when their power grid was compromised by foreign cyberattacks. We can't afford to be in the same position. It's time to invest in our own capabilities and ensure we're not held hostage by geopolitical tensions. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
